title: Technobiome
description: The tech mods you love without the biome nonsense.
body:
# The tech mods you love without the biomes you hate.
This modpack aims to provide many tech, storage, and other such mods without the drastic biomes that come with many modpacks. You may want this modpack if you want biome generation to be closer to normal rather than being super modded.

This mod pack will expand as I try to find compatible mod combinations.
<details>
<summary>Tech/Power Mods</summary>

- Applied Energistics 2 (+ Wireless Term)
- Refined Storage (+ add-ons)
- Traveler's Backpack
- EnderIO
- Industrial Foregoing
- Thermal Foundation
- Powah
- Computer Craft: Tweaked (+ Advanced Peripherals)
- Web Displays
</details>
<details>
<summary>Non-tech mods</summary>

- The Aether 
- Advanced Netherite
</details>
<details>
<summary>Create Mods</summary>
  
- Create
- Clockwork: Create x Valkyrien Skies
- Create: Crafts & Additions
- Create: Jetpack
- Create: Ore Excavation
- Create: Interactive
- Create: Steam n' rails
- Create: New Age
- Extended Cogwheels
</details>
<details>
<summary>Quality of Life Mods</summary>

- AppleSkin
- Ambient Sounds
- BetterF3
- Better Advancements
- Bartering Station
- Boat Item View
- CraftPresence
- Dismount Entity
- Easy Villagers
- Enchantment Descriptions
- Gravestone Mod
- Highlighter
- Mouse Tweaks
- No Chat Reports
- Roughly Enough Items
- Tool Stats
- Visual Workbench
- Quark
</details>

<details>
<summary>Optimization Mods</summary>

- Alternate Current
- Clumps
- Dynamic FPS
- Memory Leak Fix
- Noisium
</details>
